name: Love Is for the Dogs
overview: A divorce lawyer Aiko and vet Kai bond over their dogs, while Korean conglomerate heir  Seo-ha approaches Kai on a mission. Their paths collide in a love story about connection and growth sparked by their pets.

trailers.title: 主演･清原果耶×成田凌×ナ･イヌ　新火曜ドラマ『初恋DOGs』30秒予告公開!! 7/1(火)スタート【TBS】
